message:
chore: Sync beads issue tracker data

Update issues.jsonl with current project state reflecting completed
work on external dependency resolution, 3-way merge infrastructure,
lint command, and various bug fixes.

This file is the portable JSONL export of the beads issue database,
enabling collaboration and backup of issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
